text:
&CONTROL
 calculation = 'scf'
 forc_conv_thr = 1.1d-3
 nstep = 200
 outdir = './output/'
 prefix = 'NiCu_glycerol_ads'
 pseudo_dir = '/home/node1/PSP/PseudosP/pslibrary-master/pbe/PSEUDOPOTENTIALS/'
 restart_mode = 'from_scratch'
 tprnfor = .true.
 verbosity = 'high'
 wf_collect = .true.
/

&SYSTEM
 ibrav = 0
 nat = 13
 ntyp = 3

 ecutwfc = 50
 ecutrho = 400

 occupations = 'smearing'
 degauss = 0.02

 nspin = 1


 nosym = .false.
 noinv = .false.
 noncolin = .false.

 vdw_corr = 'grimme-d3'
/

&ELECTRONS
 conv_thr = 1.0d-7
 electron_maxstep = 200
 mixing_beta = 0.02
 mixing_mode = 'plain'
 scf_must_converge = .true.
 !startingwfc = 'random'
/




ATOMIC_SPECIES
O  15.9994 O.pbe-n-rrkjus_psl.1.0.0.UPF
C  12.011  C.pbe-n-rrkjus_psl.1.0.0.UPF
H  1.00797 H.pbe-rrkjus_psl.1.0.0.UPF
